2605.20803.title: Tunable MAGMAX: Preference-Aware Model Merging for Continual Learning
2605.20803.paper_summary: Continual learning (CL) aims to train models sequentially on multiple tasks while mitigating catastrophic forgetting of previously learned knowledge. Recent advances in large pre-trained models (LPMs) and model merging techniques, such as MAGMAX, have demonstrated effective CL performance by combining task-specific parameters. However, existing methods primarily focus on average performance across all tasks and do not adequately address how to construct models accommodating different deployment environments or varying user preferences. This paper proposes a model merging framework, termed Tunable MAGMAX, which enables preference-aware control of task-specific performance in CL. Our method introduces a preference vector that controls the number of elements selected from each task vector during model merging, allowing us to adjust the merged model performance according to their deployment needs. We further propose a method for automatically constructing appropriate preference vectors by leveraging small amounts of target environment data and datasets from model training tasks, thereby eliminating the need for manual specification. The experimental result on CL benchmark tasks demonstrates that Tunable MAGMAX effectively controls task-wise performance and successfully adapts merged models to various target environments. The proposed Tunable MAGMAX achieves superior or comparable performance to baseline methods, making it a practical solution for deploying CL models to various environments where the preferences of each task performance differ.
2605.20803.paper_summary_zh: 持續學習（CL）旨在對多個任務進行順序訓練，同時減少對先前學習知識的災難性遺忘。最近在大型預訓練模型（LPMs）和模型合併技術（如MAGMAX）方面的進展，通過結合任務特定參數，展示了有效的CL性能。然而，現有方法主要集中在所有任務的平均性能上，並未充分解決如何構建適應不同部署環境或變化用戶偏好的模型。本文提出了一種名為可調MAGMAX的模型合併框架，該框架使得在CL中能夠根據偏好進行任務特定性能的控制。我們的方法引入了一個偏好向量，該向量控制在模型合併過程中從每個任務向量中選擇的元素數量，使我們能夠根據部署需求調整合併模型的性能。我們進一步提出了一種方法，通過利用少量目標環境數據和模型訓練任務的數據集，自動構建適當的偏好向量，從而消除手動指定的需求。在CL基準任務上的實驗結果表明，可調MAGMAX有效控制任務性能，並成功地將合併模型適應於各種目標環境。所提出的可調MAGMAX在性能上優於或可與基線方法相媲美，使其成為將CL模型部署到各種環境中，滿足每個任務性能偏好不同的實用解決方案。
2605.20803.author: Kei Hiroshima et.al.
2605.20803.authors: Kei Hiroshima, Kento Uchida, Shinichi Shirakawa
